title: Max Content Length
documentation:
## Purpose
Limits the number of characters or tokens of document content passed to a machine. Used to prevent oversized inputs from exceeding downstream capacity.

## When to use
Apply this parameter on ingestion or preprocessing machines that must truncate or split content before forwarding it. It complements [Max Context Length](https://capdag.com/browse/media:max-context-length;inference;limit;operator;model;textable;numeric), which governs the model's total window.

## Notes
Valid range: 256–131072. Content exceeding this limit should be chunked using [Chunk Size](https://capdag.com/browse/media:chunk-size;textable;numeric) rather than silently truncated.
